mutations.description: Create an ordinary mutex so a blocked safety task cannot donate priority.
Give telemetry the short safety timeout instead of its documented wait policy.
Let the safety caller wait indefinitely instead of preserving its bounded latency.
Treat a guard with a cleared initialization flag as usable.
mutations.find: return guard != NULL && guard->initialized && guard->mutex != NULL;

mutations.description: Leave a stale mutex pointer visible when a later initialization attempt fails.
Report success without returning mutex ownership to the RTOS.
